𝗝𝗖𝗢𝗥𝗣-𝗡𝗢𝗠𝗔𝗗 | To provide a portable, self-contained offline media server for accessing and streaming various media types in environments without internet connectivity.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a portable, self-contained offline media server for accessing and streaming various media types in environments without internet connectivity.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Offline media streaming (movies, music, books, shows)
✅ ESP32-S3 powered
✅ Local Wi-Fi hotspot creation
✅ Browser-based interface
✅ Multiple simultaneous user streams
✅ Compact, thumbdrive form factor
✅ Optional 3D-printable hardware
✅ Offline Wikipedia and ZIM archive support
✅ Fast search for large archives
✅ Embedded media playback within archives

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Jcorp Nomad is an open-source, offline media server built on an ESP32-S3, designed to stream movies, music, books, and shows without an internet connection. It creates a local Wi-Fi hotspot and serves content through a browser interface, making it ideal for travel, remote locations, or situations without internet access.

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified and efficient way for users to upload files to a large number of file hosting services simultaneously, with added features for management and link security.
📅 Created: Sep 2023 • Updated: Jul 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✅ Upload to 133 hosts at once
✅ Link personal API keys
✅ Detailed upload history with expiration status and delete options
✅ Create and manage upload profiles
✅ Generate single sharing links for bundled host links
✅ Link protection services integration
✅ No account required
✅ Open-source, fast, and free
✅ Rust backend


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

PolyUploader is an open-source JavaScript application that allows users to upload files to multiple remote hosting sites simultaneously. It supports linking personal API keys, managing upload history, creating profiles for automation, and offers features like link protection and bundling multiple host links into a single shareable link.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗘𝗦𝗣𝟯𝟮-𝗣𝗔𝗫𝗖𝗢𝗨𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥 | Real-time passenger flow metering and environmental data collection using low-cost ESP32 devices, with an emphasis on privacy and flexible data transmission.  ✨ Notable!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Real-time passenger flow metering and environmental data collection using low-cost ESP32 devices, with an emphasis on privacy and flexible data transmission.
📅 Created: Mar 2018 • Updated: Jul 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ WiFi & Bluetooth signal detection for passenger flow metering
✅ LoRaWAN enabled for long-range data transmission
✅ Multi-sensor data collection (e.g., BME680, GPS)
✅ Privacy-focused design (no persistent MAC address storage)
✅ Multiple data output options: SD card, LoRaWAN, MQTT, Serial
✅ Low power consumption with ESP32 deep sleep mode
✅ Support for various ESP32 LoRa IoT boards


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

The ESP32-Paxcounter is a project that uses ESP32 microcontrollers to count people by detecting WiFi and Bluetooth signals from mobile devices. It also supports environmental sensors and offers various data transmission options like LoRaWAN and MQTT, with a focus on privacy by not storing MAC addresses.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗡𝗜𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗢𝗥 | Generating realistic and identity-consistent animated videos of humans from static images and pose sequences.  🔥 Super Hot!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating realistic and identity-consistent animated videos of humans from static images and pose sequences.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ End-to-end ID-preserving video diffusion framework
✅ Synthesizes high-quality videos without post-processing
✅ Conditioned on reference image and sequence of poses
✅ Global content-aware Face Encoder for identity consistency
✅ Distribution-aware ID Adapter to prevent temporal interference
✅ HJB equation-based optimization for enhanced face quality during inference


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 102 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 11 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

StableAnimator is a novel end-to-end framework for identity-preserving human image animation using video diffusion models. It synthesizes high-quality videos directly from a reference image and a sequence of poses, without requiring any post-processing like face swapping or restoration.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Francis-Rings/StableAnimator

Secluso is a privacy-focused, open-source home security camera system for Raspberry Pi. It offers end-to-end encrypted remote access to live video, alerts, and recordings, ensuring footage is not shared with cloud providers. The system emphasizes a quick 5-minute setup and reproducible builds for transparency and trust.
